zh.Kerry, Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Ki: 英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾克里
zh.Maelienydd, Radnorshire, Wales: 威爾士拉德諾斯爾馬利德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Prince Maelgwn of Maelienydd於大約1150年出生在威爾士時，他的父親Prince Cadwallon of Maelienydd and Elfael49歲，母親Efa verch Madog of Wales32歲。他於大約1169年與Jonet Verch Morgan在威爾士拉德諾斯爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1197年享年48歲。

zh-hans.Maelienydd, Radnorshire, Wales: 威尔士拉德諾斯爾馬利德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Prince Maelgwn of Maelienydd于大约1150年出生在威尔士时，他的父亲Prince Cadwallon of Maelienydd and Elfael49岁，母亲Efa verch Madog of Wales32岁。他于大约1169年与Jonet Verch Morgan在威尔士拉德諾斯爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1197年享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: Prince
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a nickname from the royal title, Old French prince (Latin princeps). The name is popular among Blacks in Britain and the United States, influenced perhaps by the fame of the American singer Prince ( b. 1958 as Prince Rogers Nelson ).

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

en.lifeSummary: When Prince Maelgwn of Maelienydd was born about 1150, in Wales, his father, Prince Cadwallon of Maelienydd and Elfael, was 49 and his mother, Efa verch Madog of Wales, was 32. He married Jonet Verch Morgan about 1169, in Radnorshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1197, at the age of 48.

fr.Kerry, Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Ki: Kerry, Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Prince Maelgwn of Maelienydd est né environ 1150, à Galles, son père, Prince Cadwallon of Maelienydd and Elfael, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Efa verch Madog of Wales, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Jonet Verch Morgan environ 1169, à Radnorshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1197, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Prince Maelgwn of Maelienydd um 1150 in Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Prince Cadwallon of Maelienydd and Elfael 49 und seine Mutter Efa verch Madog of Wales 32. Er hat um 1169 in Radnorshire, Wales Jonet Verch Morgan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1197 im Alter von 48 Jahren.

ht.Kerry, Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Ki: Kerry, Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

it.lifeSummary: Quando Prince Maelgwn of Maelienydd è nato il circa 1150 nel Galles, il suo padre, Prince Cadwallon of Maelienydd and Elfael, aveva 49 anni e il suo madre, Efa verch Madog of Wales, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Jonet Verch Morgan circa 1169, nel Radnorshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1197, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Prince Maelgwn of Maelienyddが約1150年にウェールズで生まれた時，父Prince Cadwallon of Maelienydd and Elfaelは49歳，母Efa verch Madog of Walesは32歳であった。約1169年にウェールズラドノーシュアイアでJonet Verch Morganと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1197年に48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Prince Maelgwn of Maelienydd(이)가 대략 1150년 웨일스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Prince Cadwallon of Maelienydd and Elfael(은)는 49세였고, 그의 어머니 Efa verch Madog of Wales(은)는 32세였다. 그는 대략 1169년 웨일스 라드노르실르에서 Jonet Verch Morgan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1197년 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Kerry, Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Ki: Kerry, Maldwyn, Уэльс, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Prince Maelgwn of Maelienydd nasceu aproximadamente 1150, em Gales, seu pai, Prince Cadwallon of Maelienydd and Elfael, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Efa verch Madog of Wales, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Jonet Verch Morgan aproximadamente 1169, em Radnorshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1197, com 48 anos.

ro.Kerry, Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Ki: Kerry, Montgomeryshire, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Prince Maelgwn of Maelienydd родился около 1150 г. в местности Уэльс, его отцу по имени Prince Cadwallon of Maelienydd and Elfael было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Efa verch Madog of Wales, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Jonet Verch Morgan около 1169 г. в местности радноршир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1197 г. в возрасте 48 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Prince Maelgwn of Maelienydd nació aproximadamente 1150, en Gales, su papá, Prince Cadwallon of Maelienydd and Elfael, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Efa verch Madog of Wales, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Jonet Verch Morgan aproximadamente 1169, en Radnorshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1197, a la edad de 48 años.
